change_summary: Exposed archive_context attribution fields from llm_replay.get_llm_decision_for_date without changing LLM gate behavior or strategy output.
hypothesis: LLM soft ranking is blocked because replay attribution cannot yet expose archive metadata from covered LLM response files independently of broad backtester state; adding read-only replay attribution helpers for LLM archives makes usable coverage auditable without touching strategy behavior.
notes: Observed replay archive inventory: 13 llm_prompt_resp files, 10 with archive_context, 4 ranking_eligible dates (20260412,20260413,20260414,20260422). Broad requested scope was blocked by active exp-20260426-014 and active data-owning tickets, so this run touched only quant/llm_replay.py. Backtest not rerun because strategy metrics are intentionally unchanged; before/after file is the same baseline.
